api_key.description: Orb API key. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

base_url.description: Orb API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects created at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
